_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: Trump Apr 20 said ceasefire extension 'highly unlikely'; WTI back to ~$89, Brent $95.50. Hormuz re-closed by Iran military control. All 5 watchlist alerts KEEP — each tests actively at current levels. No new additions.
pruned_removed: usdjpy_intervention_zone (price 158.72, 108p below 160; risk-off regime bids yen not USD — direction contradicts thesis; keep riskoff_break instead)

level_alerts.note: Break of 0.707 = prior pivot gone. Short on retest of 0.707 from below. SL 0.713, TP 0.700. Risk-off + AUD first-to-bleed. Currently 0.7172 (52p+ above) with bull BOS — needs regime shift (ceasefire expiry Wed could flip it).
Break 158.50 = risk-off yen flight confirmed. Short on retest from below. Price 158.72, 22p away. H1+M15 bearish BOS/ChoCh stacked — imminent. SL 159.20, TP 157.00.

WTI pulled back $89.94→$87.44 intraday but ceasefire expires Wed Apr 22 + Trump labeled Iran closure 'violation'. >90 = risk-premium accelerating. Entry on break-retest. SL 87.50, TP1 94, TP2 98. Conv 4.
Safe-haven long on pullback into zone. Price 4808 IN zone but -0.5% day on dollar bid. Needs rejection wick + M15 bullish BOS before entry. SL 4745, TP 4900/5000. Conv 3.
Psych level — exit zone for any gold longs; profit-take / partial. Not an entry.
